headline: Kraft Heinz (KHC) Valuation Check After PowerMac Launch NFL Deal And Major Mont Royal Investment
summary: Why Kraft Heinz stock is back on investors’ radar Kraft Heinz (KHC) has drawn fresh attention after a trio of updates: the launch of higher protein PowerMac, a five year global NFL partnership, and a C$250m modernization of its Mont Royal plant in Montreal. See our latest analysis for Kraft Heinz. Despite the fresh product launch and new partnerships, Kraft Heinz’s share price has a 7 day share price return of 6.9% decline and a 30 day share price return of 12.6% decline, while its 1 year...
